cleavage agent: The protein of human liver microsome homogenate in the two peaks from the size-exclusion chromatography enrichment (200 μL) was digested by trypsin.
enrichment method: the extracted lysate, containing a variety of unknown enzymes, was enriched using a Superdex 200 column.
instrument: analyzed by LC-MS/MS using a ThermoScientific Fusion Lumos mass spectrometry system.
labeling: Match between runs (match time window: 0.7 min; alignment time window: 20 min) and label-free quantitation (LFQ) options were enabled.
